name: HR holiday policy example
answer:
Employees receive 10 paid company holidays each year.
Employees receive 15 paid company holidays each year.
Employees may move every company holiday to any date they choose.

sources.title: HR Holiday Policy
sources.content:
Employees receive 10 paid company holidays each year.
The holiday calendar is published by People Operations before the start of each year.
Managers may approve schedule adjustments when business coverage allows.
